reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(A) requires a data backup plan, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state, is backed up, and that persistent volumes used by applications have backup or snapshot mechanisms in place. These checks ensure that critical data and configurations are recoverable in case of failure.
title: 164_308_a_7_ii_a: 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(A) Data backup plan
